about.title: About Me
about.bio: Solutions Architect with 15+ years of experience designing and evolving distributed systems at scale. Currently at AWS, owning end-to-end architecture for enterprise clients across hybrid cloud, Kubernetes, and real-time data platforms. CNCF Kubernaut and author of "Cracking the Kubernetes Interview".

podcasts.title: Podcasts
podcasts.dkt_desc: Technical deep-dives into DevOps, Kubernetes, and infrastructure. Interviews with industry experts, mock interviews, and hands-on topics.
podcasts.aws_desc: AWS services, architectural patterns, AI applications, and IT careers — all in Russian. Vendor-agnostic perspective from inside AWS.

speaking.title: Speaking
speaking.subtitle: 30+ technical deep-dives per year. Speaker rating: 4.5–4.7/5.0

book.title: Book
book.name: Cracking the Kubernetes Interview
book.desc: A comprehensive guide covering Kubernetes concepts, architecture, networking, security, and real-world scenarios to help you ace your next interview.
